TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: L.muan Itiniay i Datong Cen no Yilan ko L.muan a niyaro', 72 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 223 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 213 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 10 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 85%, Amis 2%, roma 7%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ɾ.mo~u~uan itiniaj i ɬ~ɮato~uŋ ʦən no~u jiɾan ko~u ɾ.mo~u~uan a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, amis *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: L.muan Itiniay i Datong Cen no Yilan ko L.muan a niyaro', 72 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 223 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 213 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 10 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 85%, Amis 2%, roma 7%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ɾ.mo~u~uan itiniaj i ɬ~ɮato~uŋ ʦən no~u jiɾan ko~u ɾ.mo~u~uan a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, amis *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
